name: wander-women
description: Verified solo-female-travel intelligence for India and 6 international destinations. Exposes Trip Intel Cards and the Beware Board incident feed to AI agents.

tools.name: get_intel
tools.description: Fetch a verified Trip Intel Card for a single destination.

tools.name: get_beware_reports
tools.description: Fetch recent moderated incident reports from the Beware Board for a city.

tools.name: list_destinations
tools.description: List all destinations with live Trip Intel Cards.
